breakout_products.title: Mistral Medium 3.5
breakout_products.content: A 128B model for coding, reasoning, and long tasks. Mistral Medium 3.5 is a 128B dense model merging coding, reasoning, and instruction-following in one set of weights. 256k context, configurable reasoning effort. Open weights on HuggingFace for engineers and teams running self-hosted inference. Product categories: Foundation Models.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Mistral Medium 3.5 release with 128B parameters and open weights
breakout_products.summary: Mistral has launched a 128-billion parameter dense foundation model that combines coding, reasoning, and instruction-following capabilities with open weights for self-hosted inference.
breakout_products.display_title: Mistral Releases Open-Weight 128B Dense Model for Advanced Coding and Reasoning Tasks
key_points: The model features a 256k context window to handle extensive tasks and complex instructions.
Users can configure the reasoning effort to optimize performance based on specific task requirements.
The weights are freely available on HuggingFace, allowing engineering teams to run the model locally.

breakout_products.title: Gemini Deep Research Agent
breakout_products.content: Web and MCP research agents, now in Gemini API. Two research agents in the Gemini API: Deep Research for low-latency interactive workflows, Deep Research Max for exhaustive async synthesis. Both support MCP data sources and native chart generation. For developers and AI engineers. Product categories: AI Infrastructure Tools, LLM Developer Tools.
breakout_products.selection_reason: New Gemini API research agents supporting MCP data and async synthesis
breakout_products.summary: Developers can now integrate two specialized research agents into their applications via the Gemini API, offering both low-latency interactive workflows and exhaustive asynchronous synthesis.
breakout_products.display_title: Gemini API Adds Dual Research Agents with MCP Support and Native Chart Generation
key_points: The standard Deep Research agent is optimized for low-latency, interactive tasks.
Deep Research Max is designed to handle exhaustive, asynchronous data synthesis for complex queries.
Both agents seamlessly integrate with Model Context Protocol (MCP) data sources and feature native chart generation capabilities.

breakout_products.title: Stripe updates Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too

Spending is secured through dedicated approval workflows to maintain user control over automated purchases.

breakout_products.title: Tabstack
breakout_products.content: Extract web data and automate browsers, no scraper required. Tabstack is a web data and automation API that delivers reliable structured output. Pass a URL and a schema, get back JSON that matches every time. Run research in one call and get cited answers back. Automate browsers without running infrastructure. The intelligence is built into every API call. No scraper to build, maintain, or watch break when a site changes. Built at Mozilla. Product categories: AI Infrastructure Tools, Browser Automation.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Browser automation API for structured data extraction without manual scraping
breakout_products.summary: Tabstack provides an API that turns web pages into schema-matched JSON and cited research answers while handling browser automation infrastructure for developers.
breakout_products.display_title: Tabstack Turns Web Pages Into Structured JSON Through an Automation API
key_points: Developers pass a URL and schema, then receive consistent structured output without maintaining custom scrapers.
The API also supports research-style calls that return cited answers from web sources.
Built-in browser automation removes the need to operate scraping infrastructure or adapt manually when sites change.

llm.title: Today we’re releasing Qwen-Scope 🔭, an open suite of sparse autoencoders for the Qwen model famil...
llm.content: Today we’re releasing Qwen-Scope 🔭, an open suite of sparse autoencoders for the Qwen model family. It turns SAE features into practical tools： 🎯 Inference — Steer model outputs by directly manipulating internal features, no prompt engineering needed 📂 Data — Classify & synthesize targeted data with minimal seed examples, boosting long-tail capabilities 🏋️ Training — Trace code-switching & repetitive generation back to their source, fix them at the root 📊 Evaluation — Analyze feature activation patterns to select smarter benchmarks and cut redundancy We hope the community uses Qwen-Scope to uncover new mechanisms inside Qwen models and build applications beyond what we explored.Excited to see what you build! 🚀 🔗🔗 Blog: https://t.co/ndwiE1tnb9 HuggingFace: https://t.co/1kICpK8eXG ModelScope: https://t.co/U7v1FjmPaW Technical Report: https://t.co/CZMjEZK0sa
llm.selection_reason: Official release of Qwen-Scope, an open suite of sparse autoencoders for model interpretability.
llm.summary: Alibaba has introduced Qwen-Scope, an open-source suite of sparse autoencoders that allows developers to manipulate internal features and steer model outputs without prompt engineering.
llm.display_title: Alibaba releases open suite of sparse autoencoders to steer and analyze Qwen models
key_points: The suite enables direct manipulation of internal model features for precise inference steering.
Developers can use it to trace and fix training issues like code-switching and repetitive generation.
It assists in evaluating feature activation patterns to select smarter benchmarks and reduce redundancy.

llm.title: AI 终于学会 「自我坦白」！Anthropic最新论文震撼来袭，「内省适配器」让黑盒模型自己说出隐藏行为
llm.content: 在过去两年的大模型工业化进程中，安全审计始终遵循着一套 “猫鼠游戏” 的默认设定：开发者微调模型以增强能力，而安全专家则通过红队测试（Red Teaming）或白盒探测来寻找潜在的 “后门” 或 “偏见”。这套逻辑的前提是：模型是一个被动的受访者，它的行为必须由外部观测者通过穷举输入或数学解构来 “审判”。然而，当 OpenAI、Anthropic、Meta 等公司全面开放微调 API 后，微调带来的不可检测行为成为了最严峻的安全挑战之一。过去我们审计模型，始终沿着一条低效的路径：通过外部输入去 “探测” 模型。黑盒测试就像在干草堆里找针，覆盖率极...
llm.selection_reason: Important Anthropic research on model safety and detecting hidden behaviors via introspection.
llm.summary: A new research paper from Anthropic proposes an introspection adapter that enables black-box AI models to self-report hidden behaviors and biases.
llm.display_title: Anthropic Introduces Introspection Adapter to Help AI Models Reveal Their Own Hidden Behaviors
key_points: The method shifts safety auditing away from inefficient external probing and traditional red-teaming.
It addresses the growing security challenge of undetectable behaviors introduced through open fine-tuning APIs.
The adapter allows models to actively participate in their own safety evaluations rather than acting as passive subjects.

image_video.title: DeepSeek“开眼”背后的技术，公开了！
image_video.content: 智东西 作者 | 陈骏达 编辑 | 心缘 智东西4月30日报道，今天，DeepSeek发布多模态技术报告《用视觉原语思考（Thinking with Visaul Primitives）》，详细阐释了昨日灰度上线的DeepSeek识图模式背后的技术细节（DeepSeek终于能看图了！我第一时间用它算命）。 DeepSeek识图模式所使用的是一个284B参数、13B激活多模态推理模型，其正式名称尚未对外发布，基座模型是DeepSeek-V4-Flash。DeepSeek称，这一模型的权重将整合进DeepSeek的基础模型，并在未来发布。 当前，传统...
